summary: Completed testing of Iteration 14 features: Legacy PolicyType enum restored (Group Health/GMC, GTL, GPA, Group Accident, Group Term), Family Definition (ESKP/ESK/E) as separate field, Audit Log page with filters and pagination. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_features.py - Created test suite for Iteration 14 features
seed_data_creation: Test policies and claims created during backend testing were cleaned up. Existing data: 4 policies (TEST_POL_112123, POL-E2E-TEST, POL-NEW-001, POL-GMC-002), 3 claims in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 features fully tested and working. Key changes: 1) PolicyType enum restored to legacy values: Group Health, Group Accident, Group Term, GPA, GTL. 2) FamilyDefinition is now a separate field with values: ESKP, ESK, E. 3) Admin Policies page shows both Type and Family Def columns, Add Policy dialog has both dropdowns. 4) Audit Log page (/admin/audit-log) shows all user actions with filters (action, resource, username search) and pagination. Audit log captures: LOGIN, REGISTER, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, APPROVED, REJECTED, CREATE_USER, DELETE_USER, PROMOTE actions. 5) HR Policies Dashboard (/hr/policies) shows: 6 key stats cards, 4 life category cards, 3 charts (Policy Status Pie, Lives Breakdown Pie, By Policy Type Bar), and policies table with Family column. 6) HR Claims Dashboard (/hr/claims) shows: 4 claim type cards (Total, Reimbursement, Cashless, Rejected), 4 calculated metrics (Under Process, Total Premium, Claims Ratio=Claims/Premium*100, Renewal Pricing=Claims*1.30), 3 charts (By Status Pie, Claims Amount Breakdown Bar, Monthly Trend Line), and claims table. 7) All recharts components (PieChart, BarChart, LineChart) render correctly with data.

audit_log_page.details: Audit Log page loads with 31 entries. Table shows Timestamp, User, Role, Action, Resource, Details columns. Filters (Action dropdown, Resource dropdown, Username search) all present and working. Pagination controls available.

admin_policies_page.details: Table shows Type and Family Def columns. Add Policy dialog has Policy Type dropdown (Group Health GMC, Group Term GTL, Group Accident GPA, Group Accident, Group Term) and Family Definition dropdown (ESKP, ESK, E).

hr_policies_dashboard.details: Shows 6 key stats cards (Policies=4, Active=4, Premium=₹16,10,000, Total Lives=476, Additions=23, Deletions=8), 4 life category cards (Employees=180, Spouse=150, Kids=110, Parents=35), 3 charts (Policy Status Pie, Lives Breakdown Pie, By Policy Type Bar), and policies table with Family column.

hr_claims_dashboard.details: Shows 8 metric cards including Claims Ratio (26.7%) and Renewal Expected Pricing (₹5,59,000), 3 charts (By Status Pie, Claims Amount Breakdown Bar, Monthly Trend Line), and claims table.

backend_audit_log_api.details: GET /api/audit-log returns paginated results with filters (action, resource, username). HR users correctly denied access (403). Audit entries created for LOGIN, CREATE policy, CREATE claim actions.

backend_policies_api.details: POST /api/policies accepts all policy types and family definitions. GET /api/policies-analytics returns family_definition in policies array.

backend_claims_api.details: GET /api/claims-analytics returns claims_ratio (calculated as Claims/Premium*100) and renewal_expected_pricing (calculated as Claims*1.30).
